raw.title: We May Be Entering A Second Axial Age
raw.excerpt: The post We May Be Entering A Second Axial Age appeared first on NOEMA.

llm_processed.summary: A new Axial Age is emerging, marked by a planetary polycrisis, but also opportunities for transformative change. The old maps no longer apply, and new approaches are needed to navigate this complex and uncertain world.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Enable a paradigm shift in how we understand and respond to the planetary polycrisis, opening up new possibilities for collective action and transformative change.
